name: SheerID
description: SheerID verifies eligibility for gated consumer offers (students, military, teachers, first responders) via API, preventing promotion abuse and coupon fraud. It is widely used by retailers, travel and SaaS companies running segment-specific

seo.title: SheerID — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: SheerID: SheerID verifies eligibility for gated consumer offers (students, military, teachers, first responders) via API, preventing promotion abuse and coupon

when_to_use: Student eligibility verification for gated academic discounts
Military affiliation check for service member offer programs
Teacher and first responder verification for retail promotions
Promotion abuse prevention via verified eligibility gating
Segment-specific offer gate API for SaaS pricing tiers

pros: Instantly verifies eligibility via authoritative data
Prevents promo and coupon abuse effectively
Clean API with solid retail integrations
Supports major segments like students and military
cons: Narrow use case: gated offer eligibility
Coverage thinner outside US and UK
Not a fraud platform for payments or ATO
review.verdict: A sharp, single-purpose tool for verified gated offers; do not expect it to do anything broader.
review.best_for: Retail, travel and SaaS brands running verified discounts for students, military or first responders.
review.not_for: Teams looking for payment, login or signup fraud protection.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
